actions.value:
To help identify the issue please review the following questions and answer to the best of your ability. 

1. What version of Jaxx was used to export the keys?

    -- You can tap the menu at the upper right and see the version within the About portion of that menu.

2. What device and OS version were you on at the time of exporting from Jaxx?

3. How did you remove the key or phrase from Jaxx and import it into Edge?

     -- Please be specific about the steps you took, where it was stored, who may have helped you, etc.

4. Did you visit any websites to aid in this process?

     -- Please give all websites visited. 

5. How did you get your copy of Jaxx? Website, link, app store, etc? Please link the website you visited. 

6. Could you please send us your logs file?

- Go to the main Menu (≡) in the upper right corner, tap Settings, scroll to the bottom and select 'Export Logs'

- Enter your email address in the notes field to help us identify your log submission.

- Tap 'Send Logs to Edge' and reply here with time sent.

7. Please supply the first three words of your seed phrase (NOTE: only the first three words!) This will aid in our discovery of any potential leaks. 

8. Have you ever taken a screenshot or picture of your seed phrase or qr code? 

9. Please provide the transaction IDs of unknown transactions. 

10. Please provide the username of the account.
